name: 5L MLP4x + BigramHash + SmearGate + OrthoInit + SWA + QAT + Sliding Window (1xH100)
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 submission: 15 experiments exploring width-vs-depth tradeoffs, discovering that 5-layer MLP4x (hidden=2048) significantly outperforms deeper narrower architectures. Combined with BigramHash(4096), SmearGate, orthogonal init, QAT (int8 STE), SWA (18 checkpoints), and sliding window eval (stride=64). Post-quant val_bpb 1.3827 under the 16MB artifact cap. Autonomous AI-driven experimentation using autoresearch framework.
